report.indication: Right knee pain after sports injury.
report.technique: Right knee MRI without contrast at 3T.
report.findings: Menisci: radial tear of the right medial meniscus posterior horn. Ligaments: ACL torn on the right side. PCL intact. Articular cartilage: focal full-thickness loss in the right lateral femoral compartment. Bones: bone marrow oedema in the right lateral femoral condyle.
report.impression:
1. Left medial meniscus radial tear and ACL tear on the left.
2. Bone marrow oedema in the left lateral femoral condyle.
